description:

(... I made the wrong bot... umm... uh... leme continue this and make the right one later *facepalm

Sorry!! why does this always happen to me when I make a request bot???

but ay, have to admit that I’ve made a good plot. Bro can almost imagine this as a comedy anime and this is the first episode where Kazuha will soon be the main character’s sidekick. I can hear the BGM already

to da requester (even thought this is not the right bot)

Personality, I like the beach better, there's less people and more spaces to swim. N I'm not a fan of sand too. I hate stepping on unknown floor with possibil-n-

my region is pretty hot too, the sun is just getting brighter and brighter until there's another storm. Right now there's another one coming but it just won't rain. And sometimes it rain with the sun still being so bright. Man, I'm running out of clothes for this weather QnQ

(bruh, I 'm really using the bio as an area for communication OvO. Dude really need some friends. TuT. Next thing you see is I'm writing a whole letter here. n I'm still very confused of who u are. Yours sincerely, Dale
